settings.content: Controls the SAVE90 launch-edition discount surfaces (PDP card, sticky bar, cart drawer reminder, URL auto-apply). Mike must also create SAVE90 in Shopify admin → Discounts as a £90 fixed-amount-off code with £179.99 minimum order. Framing is 'UK Spring Launch — limited promotional pricing' rather than the original 'first 1,000 customers' (which contradicted the existing 10,000+ customer social proof).

settings.label: Auto-apply SAVE90 on first visit
settings.info: When enabled, first-time visitors are redirected through /discount/SAVE90 so the discount is in their Shopify session before they reach the cart. Disable to require manual code entry at checkout.

settings.label: Hair + Skin Duo bundle handle
settings.info: Product handle of the Shopify Bundles app product that combines Cap + Face Mask. Tier 2 of the cap PDP picker adds this single bundle product to cart. If blank or invalid, Tier 2 falls back to multi-item POST (cap + face mask as separate line items).
